summary: Comprehensive testing of PasseportEtudiant app - French passport-styled orientation app. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed covering: Select page, Cover page, Identity page, Stamps page, Recap page, Teacher page, Analytics page, Stand page, QR Scanner overlay, and localStorage persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
API endpoints properly handle errors with appropriate HTTP status codes
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from responses using clean_doc helper
Environment variables are used correctly for MONGO_URL and REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds on startup: 16 schools with qr_tokens, demo class PROF2026, demo students Lucas and Théo
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_passport_api.py cover all endpoints. Frontend tested with Playwright covering all pages and interactions. QR scanner fallback (demo school buttons) works in headless mode. localStorage persists student ID correctly.

backend: POST /api/classes - creates new class with unique code
POST /api/students - creates student with valid class_code
POST /api/stamps - returns duplicate=true for existing stamp
GET /api/students/{id}/recap - returns score, recos, next, stamps
frontend: Select page - displays demo profiles, create card, teacher/analytics buttons
Cover page - shows passport cover with user name and serial
Identity page - shows passport identity data, QR code, consents
Identity page - anonymous alert for Théo
Identity page - consent toggle persists to backend
Stamps page - hall tabs navigation
Stamps page - stamp toggle with animation
Stamps page - progress bar updates
Stamps page - anonymous empty state for Théo
Scanner overlay - opens with demo school buttons fallback
Recap page - shows score, recos, next steps when >=3 stamps
Recap page - shows unlock message when <3 stamps
Recap page - empty state for anonymous
Teacher page - create and access cards
Teacher page - access demo class PROF2026
Teacher page - create new class generates code
Teacher dashboard - shows KPIs and student list
Analytics page - displays all KPIs and charts
Stand page - displays school name, QR code, qr_token
Create page - validates class code
Bottom nav - visible and navigates correctly
localStorage - persists selected student id
